state.next-action: The heavy-blob history cleanup is done and `main` pushes again. The shared provider contract is landed, `@portfolio/repub-builder` builds from the vendored standalone repo, hosted book-artifact and public-media publishers are live, `/apps` reads from seeded Supabase-backed `site-app-records` through an SSR-safe worker boundary, the planning-pack modal now resolves through a server manifest that can swap in published `site-download-assets` URLs, and `/resumes` HTML routes now prefer published storage-backed files before falling back to repo-local sources. Next, continue `global-data-03-03` and `global-data-03-02` for resume and project metadata while reusing the same download-asset path, followed by the owner-only shell refresh in `global-auth-02`.

agent-id-policy.rule: Optional: register a unique id in STATE.xml before claiming tasks if you use CLI task-update.
